# aristotle.me

> Personal website and blog of Aristotle (Aris) Malichetty. Marketing analyst, product builder, and developer who builds with AI. Writes about building SaaS products, marketing analytics, AI-powered development, and lessons from shipping fast.

Aris has a Master's in Business Analytics from the University of New Haven. He builds APIs, automation tools, Chrome extensions, and full-stack apps. He works with 40+ clients across healthcare, e-commerce, SaaS, and creator economy on analytics, dashboards, lead generation, and go-to-market strategy.

He operates under Xen AI LLC and uses Claude Code and Cursor daily to ship software.

## Blog Posts
- [Why I Moved Away from WordPress (And What I Use Now)](https://aristotle.me/blog/why-i-moved-away-from-wordpress): Two years on WordPress, then switching to Astro + Cloudflare Pages. What broke and what got better.
- [I Built aristotle.me in 6 Hours. Here's Every Mistake I Made.](https://aristotle.me/blog/building-aristotle-me): Every decision, mistake, and deleted feature from building aristotle.me with Claude Code.

## Pages
- [About](https://aristotle.me/about): Bio, skills, clients, current projects, and tech stack.
- [Blog](https://aristotle.me/blog): Posts on building products, marketing analytics, and AI development.
- [Projects](https://aristotle.me/projects): Open-source tools, APIs, and apps Aris has built.
- [Contact](https://aristotle.me/contact): How to reach Aris.

## Optional
- [RSS Feed](https://aristotle.me/rss.xml): Full blog feed in RSS format.
